## reference · Von Restorff Effect

* When multiple similar objects are present, the one that differs from the rest is most likely to be remembered.
* Make important information or key actions visually distinctive.
* Use restraint when placing emphasis on visual elements to avoid competition and mistaken identification as ads.
* Don't rely exclusively on color to communicate contrast, as this may exclude those with color vision deficiency or low vision.
* Carefully consider users with motion sensitivity when using motion to communicate contrast.

Sources: https://lawsofux.com/von-restorff-effect/
